overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a vast desert landscape toward large rock formations. The scene features red-orange desert terrain with sparse vegetation, clear blue skies, and distinctive butte formations in the distance, rendered in a high-fidelity game engine.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain with distant rock buttes

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through desert terrain toward the large rounded butte and spire formations

notable_agents.action: small group of animals grazing near the base of the distant butte

entered.detail: tall twin-spire rock formation rising prominently against the sky
large smooth-sided desert mountain with reddish-brown coloring
dry brown bushes and vegetation scattered across the desert floor
flat-topped mesa visible in the far left background

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through an expansive desert landscape under a clear blue sky. Sparse dry vegetation dots the reddish terrain while massive rock formations dominate the horizon. In the distance, a small group of animals can be seen near the base of the central butte as the character approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across an expansive desert landscape that gradually closes the distance between the traveler and massive rock formations. It begins with a steady trek through reddish terrain under a clear blue sky, where sparse dry vegetation dots the ground. As the camera advances, the horizon is increasingly dominated by the towering scale of the central buttes. The scene then shifts focus toward the base of these formations, revealing a small group of animals in the distance as the character draws closer to the geological landmarks.
